title: Belgium plans to nationalise nuclear power plants
summary_full: Prime Minister Bart De Wever said the move would see "less dependence on fossil fuel imports and more control over our own supply".
summary_public: Prime Minister Bart De Wever said the move would see "less dependence on fossil fuel imports and more control over our own supply".

BE.label: positive
